zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybilia Humez於大約1080年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯時，她的父親Peter de Humez32歲，母親A Bulmer23歲。她於1099年與Anschetil de Bulmer在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1129年12月在英國英格蘭越可爾法林頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybilia Humez于大约1080年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆布朗加斯时，她的父亲Peter de Humez32岁，母亲A Bulmer23岁。她于1099年与Anschetil de Bulmer在英国英格兰達勒姆布朗加斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1129年12月在英国英格兰越可爾法林頓享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Humez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Hume , with excrescent -s, or a variant of Holmes .

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Sybilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Sal, Salvatore, Silvio.  Spanish Jose, Juan, Zoraida.
Italian (mainly southern): from the medieval female personal name Sibilia, from Old French Sibilie (see Sibley ).

variants.name: Scibelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Gennaro, Filomena, Marco, Paolo, Salvator.
Italian (Campania): patronymic or plural form of a variant of the female personal name   Sibilia   (compare   Scibilia  ).

variants.name: Scibilia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Giuseppe, Rosario, Angelo, Antonio, Carmela, Fabio, Fortunato, Gaspare, Girolamo, Rocco, Sal, Salvatore, Santo.
Italian (Sicily): from a variant of the female personal name   Sibilia  .

en.lifeSummary: When Sybilia Humez was born about 1080, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Peter de Humez, was 32 and her mother, A Bulmer, was 23. She married Anschetil de Bulmer in 1099, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in December 1129, in Farlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybilia Humez est née environ 1080, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter de Humez, avait 32 ans et sa mère, A Bulmer, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Anschetil de Bulmer en 1099, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en décembre 1129, à Farlington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybilia Humez um 1080 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter de Humez 32 und ihre Mutter A Bulmer 23. Sie hat 1099 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom Anschetil de Bulmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Dezember 1129 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Farlington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybilia Humez è nata il circa 1080 nel Brancepeth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Peter de Humez, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, A Bulmer, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Anschetil de Bulmer nel 1099, nel Brancepeth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1129, nel Farlington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybilia Humezが約1080年にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスで生まれた時，父Peter de Humezは32歳，母A Bulmerは23歳であった。1099年にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスでAnschetil de Bulmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1129年12月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアファルリントンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybilia Humez(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de Humez(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 A Bulmer(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1099년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 Anschetil de Bulmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1129년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 패를링턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybilia Humez nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter de Humez, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, A Bulmer, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Anschetil de Bulmer em 1099, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1129, em Farlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybilia Humez родилась около 1080 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Peter de Humez было 32 года, а матери, которую звали A Bulmer, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anschetil de Bulmer в 1099 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла декабрь 1129 г. в местности фарлингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybilia Humez nació aproximadamente 1080, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter de Humez, tenía 32 años y su mamá, A Bulmer, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anschetil de Bulmer en 1099, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1129, en Farlington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
